title: Graham Hancock on TRUE location of Ark of Covenant
summary: Graham Hancock discusses the Ethiopian claim that the Ark of the Covenant is located in Axum, Ethiopia, kept in a chapel within a religious enclosure. He describes reports of guardians suffering from radiation-like symptoms including burns, cataracts, and early death.

key_claims.claim: The Ethiopians claim the Ark of the Covenant is kept in a chapel beside the Church of Saint Mary of Zion in Axum
The Church of Saint Mary of Zion dates to the 16th century
Guardians of the Ark reportedly get sick and die very rapidly
People who guard the Ark reportedly develop burns on their faces and cataracts, symptoms consistent with radiation damage
The Ark of the Covenant is fundamental to Ethiopian culture
